chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-246 of 2023 (Muhammad Azam Marri Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 03-04-2024. Petitioner in person. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G, Sindh. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondents to remover illegal Jhatas and pipes from the watercourse undertakes its repair and provide irrigation water to the Khatedars of tail of Faiz Wah. On asking, what kind of concern, the petitioner has got with the subject water course. It was stated by him that his grandfather and father is having landed property on subject watercourse. No such proof is produced. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the grandfather and father of the petitioner are having landed property on the subject watercourse then they alone have a cause of action to initiate legal proceedings against the respondents and not the petitioner; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
